input.title: Exit Interview
input.subject: Journalist embeds with an outplacement department helping newly redundant employees in their 50s

test_cases.notes: Strong hook, natural spoken rhythm, central tension clearly stated. Ends with a forward-leaning call to continue.

input.title: Below Grade
input.subject: Each episode examines one infrastructure decision made decades ago that continues to shape a city today — traffic patterns, flood risk, housing access
input.target: Podcast listeners, urban professionals, general interest

test_cases.notes: Format and subject land clearly. Hook slightly weaker for an audio-first pitch. Extended version effectively adds production-stage context.

input.title: Material Record
input.subject: Long-form documentary episodes (20-40 min) profiling overlooked industrial and manufacturing sites across Europe before they close
input.stage: Launched, 12 episodes live, looking for brand partnership

test_cases.notes: Pitch adapts well to a brand-meeting context rather than a broadcaster meeting. Good differentiation from general history content.
